message:
🌱 cloudevents: Map and Object type problems (#1909)

* 🌱 Add cloudevents: Map and Object type problems mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🌱 Add cloudevents: Map and Object type problems mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix cloudevents Map/Object type mission: remove raw code workaround

Replace raw Go code workaround resolution with clean summary referencing
the CloudEvents v1.0 spec clarification. Remove raw code snippets and
fix the apply step to describe the actual spec resolution.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cloudevents-261-map-and-object-type-problems",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cloudevents: Map and Object type problems",
+    "description": "Map and Object type problems. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current cloudevents setup",
+        "description": "Verify your cloudevents version:\nCloudEvents is a specification \u2014 check your SDK version (e.g., pip show cloudevents)\nThis feature requires cloudevents as a dependency."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review cloudevents configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant cloudevents configuration:\nThis is related to #184. Currently the spec introduces a lot of confusion around Maps and Objects when it comes to JSON.\n\nSo, the data attribute is an Object, which means it can be Map, String or Binary. Map is a map of name to Object pairs."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Map and Object type problems",
+        "description": "The CloudEvents v1.0 specification resolved the Map and Object type confusion. Extension attribute values are now restricted to: Boolean, Integer, String, Binary, URI, URI-Reference, or Timestamp. Complex types like Map and Object should be serialized to String or Binary format before being used as extension values.\n\nSee the source issue and CloudEvents v1.0 spec for details."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade cloudevents to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade cloudevents:\nUpdate the cloudevents dependency in your project manifest to the latest version.\nSee the project's releases: https://github.com/cloudevents/spec/releases"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Map and Object type problems\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The Map and Object type problems were addressed as part of the CloudEvents v1.0 specification. The spec clarified that extension attribute values must be one of: Boolean, Integer, String, Binary, URI, URI-Reference, or Timestamp. Complex types like Map and Object are not directly supported as extension values \u2014 they should be serialized to String or Binary if needed.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "cloudevents",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "cloudevents"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/cloudevents/spec/issues/261",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/cloudevents/spec"
+    },
+    "reactions": 1,
+    "comments": 25,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "cloudevents"
+    ],
+    "description": "CloudEvents is a specification \u2014 check your SDK version (e.g., pip show cloudevents)"
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-02T06:30:02.329Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,

+  }
+}
